task_completion.description: Configure static hostAliases for clearinghouse.local and audit.local
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the deployment YAML or 'kubectl describe' output with hostAliases containing IP 198.51.100.15 for clearinghouse.local and 198.51.100.16 for audit.local.
Screenshots showing the deployment YAML or 'kubectl describe' output with 'dnsPolicy' explicitly set to 'None'.

task_completion.description: Provide a custom dnsConfig with specified nameservers, search domains, and ndots
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'dnsConfig' section with nameservers 1.1.1.1 and 1.0.0.1, search domains 'trading.internal' and 'finance.internal', and an option for 'ndots' set to '2'.

task_completion.description: Update the 'fast-cache' volume to use a RAM disk
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'volumes' section where the 'fast-cache' volume is configured as an 'emptyDir' with 'medium: Memory' and 'sizeLimit: 512Mi'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the deployment successfully rolls out and pods are Running
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output of 'kubectl get pods -n legacy-migration' showing the trading-monolith pods in a 'Running' state, or 'kubectl rollout status' confirming the successful rollout.

integrity.description: Verify that changes were actually applied to the Kubernetes cluster
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal output like 'deployment.apps/trading-monolith edited' or 'configured' after applying a YAML file, rather than just editing a local text file without applying.

integrity.description: Verify genuine interaction with the Kubernetes cluster
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent used valid 'kubectl' commands or a legitimate Kubernetes dashboard to make and verify changes.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not fake the success output
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent did not use 'echo' commands or manually type out the expected pod status or configuration outputs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target deployment: 'trading-monolith' in namespace 'legacy-migration'. Expected hostAliases: 198.51.100.15 (clearinghouse.local) and 198.51.100.16 (audit.local). Expected DNS: policy 'None', nameservers [1.1.1.1, 1.0.0.1], searches [trading.internal, finance.internal], ndots '2'. Expected volume: 'fast-cache' with emptyDir medium 'Memory' and sizeLimit '512Mi'.
